revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Find sources/proj/is video]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 46526 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Find_sources%2Fproj%2Fis_video here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Find_sources%2Fproj%2Fis_video for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{#if: {{find page text|text=%{%{WikiProject Video [gG]ames|plain=f}} | 1 | }}<noinclude>{{Documentation|content= == Usage == Checks the WikiProjects listed on the current page for the presence of [[WP:WikiProject Video games]] and returns boolean.}}</noinclude>
